context: 2020 was defined by the pandemic and the total dominance of French rap and urban music. Jul's Marseille collective anthem 'Bande Organisée' became a cultural phenomenon, featuring eight rappers and embodying the collaborative, street-rooted style of southern French rap. The chart reflected streaming's full takeover of French music consumption, with Afro-influenced trap alongside global crossover hits like The Weeknd's 'Blinding Lights'.

tracks.title: Bande Organisée
tracks.artist: Jul feat. SCH, Naps, Kofs, Elams, Solda, Houari & Soso Maness
